nodes.label: AI detection is a safety net
nodes.norm_label: ai detection is a safety net

nodes.label: La detecció d'IA és una xarxa de seguretat

nodes.label: La vigilància de fitxers és dissuasiva
nodes.norm_label: la vigilancia de fitxers es dissuasiva

nodes.label: La detección de IA es una red de seguridad
nodes.norm_label: la deteccion de ia es una red de seguridad

nodes.label: La vigilancia de archivos es disuasoria
nodes.norm_label: la vigilancia de archivos es disuasoria

nodes.label: Existing Graph Fast Path
nodes.rationale: Use an existing graph before rebuilding or raw browsing when answering natural-language codebase questions.

nodes.label: Token Cost Reporting
nodes.rationale: The report must expose token costs so extraction expense remains visible.

nodes.label: Query First Rule
nodes.rationale: Existing graph queries are preferred over broad source browsing for codebase questions.

nodes.label: Dirty Graph Tolerance
nodes.rationale: Dirty graphify-out files are expected after hooks or incremental updates and should not block graph usage.

nodes.label: File Monitoring
nodes.rationale: File monitoring is heuristic and intended to leave evidence rather than exhaustively hook every file open.

nodes.label: Deterrent System With Evidence
nodes.rationale: The system is a practical deterrent that records evidence, not a fully secure lock against administrator users.

nodes.label: AI Detection Safety Net
nodes.rationale: AI detection checks real connections and DNS cache so it can catch AI access even if radio disabling fails.
